articles.title: UBS launches tokenized money market investment fund on Ethereum
articles.description: The fund joins Blackrock's BUIDL and Franklin Templeton's FOBXX as examples of Ethereum-based real world asset tokenization funds.

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Smashes Golden Cross, Here’s How Price Reacts
articles.description: Solana (SOL), also called the ‘Ethereum killer,’ has completed a golden cross pattern that the community had anticipated for days. Notably, the golden cross normally indicates a potential upward price momentum. It serves as a technical bullish pattern confirmation for an underlying asset. Solana’s Golden Cross Twist A golden cross occurs when an asset’s short-term […] The post Solana (SOL)...
